name: Soft Tacos
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cooked Meat (shredded beef, pork, or chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Corn Tortillas should be cut to a diameter of 6 inches.
2. Use shredded beef, pork, or chicken for the meat filling.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a skillet until hot.
4. Cook tortillas one at a time in the hot oil until soft, about 30 seconds. Drain excess oil.
5. Spoon 2 tablespoons of the shredded meat mixture slightly below the center of each tortilla.
6. Roll the tortilla over the meat and secure with a wooden pick.
7. Heat vegetable oil in the skillet until it is hot.
8. Cook each taco in the oil, turning once, until light golden brown, about 2 minutes. Drain excess oil.
9. Remove the wooden picks.
10. Garnish with 2 or 3 of the following items: chopped tomatoes, shredded lettuce, chopped onion, chopped green chiles, chopped avocado, or shredded cheese.
